nodes.body: { 🎼 Music Releases } _Laz Richardson_ released [Becky Bop](https://soundcloud.com/lazthecomposer/becky_bop) from Becky vs The Invasion.
{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Luke Puchner-Hardman_, _StarBiscute_, _Laz Richardson_, and _Timconceivable_ released [Becky vs The Invasion](https://lupuchard.itch.io/becky) for the Spring Jam!
{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Chris Taylor_, _ChelseaCatz_, _Andrew Mannis_, and _Kit Kitsis_ released [Ravioli Archer](https://shredderct.itch.io/ravioli-archer) for the Spring Jam!
{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Wes Ehrlichman_ and _Mike Lee_ released [Toasted Rivalries](https://superwes.itch.io/toasted-rivalries) for the Spring Jam!
{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Simple Pixel Games_ released [Guess The Decade in STL History](https://simplepixelgamesllc.itch.io/stl-history) for the Spring Jam!
{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Copper Coin_ released [T-Rav Flyer](https://copper-coin.itch.io/flying-ravioli) for the Spring Jam!
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _James C. Kane_ is continuing work on [Starspeed](https://x.com/jamesckane/status/2050331344404709644) with procedural spaceship generation.
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tony Wojnar_ is continuing work on _Crayon Canyon_ for [Dribble 2](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social).
{ 🎼 Music Releases } _Laz Richardson_ released a soundtrack for [Operation Alien Translation](https://lazarusrichardson.bandcamp.com/album/operation-alien-translation), a game made for Ludum Dare 59.
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Hutchkey Games_ is working on a fun new prototype called [Send It!](https://youtu.be/WPxYBvirXNU)!

{ 🎮 Game Releases } _Jundroo_ dropped [Simple Planes 2](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2840470/SimplePlanes_2/), the sequel to their first flight sim game, which features online multiplayer and an 80s-inspired soundtrack by _Fat Bard!_

{ 🎮 Game Releases } The long-awaited [Bubsy 4D](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3237970/Bubsy_4D/) by _Fabraz_ features music by _**Fat Bard**_ and is set to release on May 22! It's available for pre-order and you can play the demo now!

{!header} April showers brought our [Spring Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/stlgamedev-spring-jam-2026) and a whole bouquet of updates from local devs! We also [hiked](https://bsky.app/profile/stlgame.dev/post/3mjf376vq2l2m) through woods, [commiserated](https://bsky.app/profile/stlgame.dev/post/3mj3lspsfb22p) at a local watering hole, [played](https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313935700/) a game about _tax evasion_, and [explored](https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314100367/) the realms of audio.

**Don't miss out on the fun! [Join us for events in May!](https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/)**

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Butterscotch Shenanigans_ announced a release date of **July 30th** for their next game [How Many Dudes?](https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/3934270/view/528750685224702336), which currently has over 200,000 wishlists and 480k demo downloads!

{ 📢 Announcements } [Registration](https://forms.gle/MQ1Syf5xG5kKRBVx5) is now open to showcase your games at our [Share & Play: Game Playtesting](https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313646267/) event on May 23rd! Everyone is encouraged to show off their game projects whether they're finished or works in progress! Game jam games, video games, board games, physical games, student projects, and everything in between! If you don't have something to show, come out to playtest what others are making!

events.title: May GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE!
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/312692352
events.location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us

events.title: May Game Audio Club
events.description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio.
We’re a chill group where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314580070
events.location: MAP St. Louis Montessori School - 3840 Washington Ave - St. Louis, MO, us

events.title: Game Club: Reventure
events.description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design. Our game for May is ... Reventure, a pixely non-linear adventure with over 100 endings! This month will be meeting in-person once again at Sauce on the Side! 


For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314391964
events.location: Sauce on the Side - 701 N. New Ballas Road - Creve Coeur, MO, US

events.title: Share & Play: Game Playtesting!
events.description:
Join us for casual game playtesting! This is an opportunity for developers to share their progress, observe playtesting, and get feedback on their projects, and for local game enthusiasts to get their hands on new games, prototypes, and give helpful feedback. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313646267
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us
